name: gei
description: A compact, progressive-disclosure skill collection for agent work, research, design, and durable project memory.

interface.shortDescription: Progressive skill routing for practical agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: Gei packages a small set of skills for routing work, planning, research, design, and project memory.
defaultPrompt: Use Gei to route this task.

Use Gei Memo to update project memory.
